  "findings": [
    "Wrong gasket type/material installed for the specified piping service."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the flanged joint assembly immediately.",
    "Disassemble the joint and discard the incorrect gasket.",
    "Verify the correct gasket material against the piping specification and engineered drawings.",
    "Inspect flange faces for damage before reassembly with the correct gasket."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing an incorrect gasket material for the process service violates ASME PCC-1 and ASME B16.5. It can lead to premature joint failure, hazardous leaks, or chemical attack of the gasket material once the system is pressurized or put into service. The work must be halted and corrected before proceeding with final bolt torqueing.",
  "references": [
    "ASME PCC-1 Guidelines for Pressure Boundary Flanged Joint Assembly",
    "ASME B16.5 Pipe Flanges and Flanged Fittings"
  ]
}
